# SVG Workspace

SVG Workspace is a browser-based application for analyzing, optimizing, comparing, and exporting SVG files. All processing happens locally in the browser, so uploaded SVGs are never sent to a server.

## Purpose

SVG Workspace helps developers, designers, and front-end engineers improve SVG quality by identifying issues, explaining them, running safe optimizations, and offering explicit Transform actions when intent matters.

## Features

- SVG health analysis
- Optimize SVG powered by the Safe Fix Engine
- Scalable SVG analysis
- Generate ViewBox as a Transform action when it is safe
- Original vs. optimized comparison
- SVG source inspection
- Metadata and scalability checks
- SVG export
- Accessibility checks

## Core workflow

1. Upload an SVG.
2. Analyze its health.
3. Optimize SVG.
4. Compare the original and optimized SVG.
5. Export the optimized SVG.

## Product principles

- Explain, don't surprise.
- Safe over aggressive.
- Keep Transform actions explicit when they depend on user intent.
- Preserve visual output.
- Browser-first and privacy-first.
- Files are processed locally.

## Links

- Website: https://svgworkspace.com/
- GitHub: https://github.com/fenda/svgworkspace

## Audience

SVG Workspace is intended for:

- Front-end developers
- UI engineers
- Designers
- Design system teams
- Anyone working with SVG assets
